org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Interface Probe

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultProbe
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public interface Probe
    A probe permits to obtain information on agents.

    A probe must not be invasive and the agent is able to ignore them (ie. to not provide information).

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      <T> T[] getProbeArray(String probeName, Class<T> clazz)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      AgentIdentifier getProbedAgentId()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the identifier of the probed agent.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      float getProbeFloat(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      long getProbeLong(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      String[] getProbeNames()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the names of the probed values inside the agent.
      String getProbeString(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      <T> T getProbeValue(String probeName, Class<T> clazz)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probed value.
      boolean hasProbeValue(String probeName)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if the specified probe value exists.
      boolean hasProbeValues()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if this probe contains a value.
      boolean isProbedAgentAlive()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if the agent is alive.

    • Method Detail

      • getProbeNames

        String[] getProbeNames()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the names of the probed values inside the agent.
        Returns:
        the names of the probed values inside the agent.

      • getProbeValue

        <T> T getProbeValue(String probeName,
                  Class<T> clazz)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.
        Type Parameters:
        T - is the type of the value to reply.
        Parameters:
        clazz - is the type of the value to reply.
        probeName - is the name of the probed value
        Returns:
        the value

      • getProbeArray

        <T> T[] getProbeArray(String probeName,
                    Class<T> clazz)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.

        This method permits to force the type of the value.

        Type Parameters:
        T - is the type of the value to reply.
        Parameters:
        probeName - is the name of the probed value.
        clazz - is the type of the expected value.
        Returns:
        the value or null

      • getProbeInt

        int getProbeInt(String probeName)
                throws ProbeValueNotDefinedException
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.

        This method permits to force the type of the value.

        Parameters:
        probeName - is the name of the probed value.
        Returns:
        the value or null
        Throws:
        ProbeValueNotDefinedException

      • getProbeLong

        long getProbeLong(String probeName)
                  throws ProbeValueNotDefinedException
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.

        This method permits to force the type of the value.

        Parameters:
        probeName - is the name of the probed value.
        Returns:
        the value or null
        Throws:
        ProbeValueNotDefinedException

      • getProbeFloat

        float getProbeFloat(String probeName)
                    throws ProbeValueNotDefinedException
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.

        This method permits to force the type of the value.

        Parameters:

        Returns:
        the value or null

        String getProbeString(String probeName)
                      throws ProbeValueNotDefinedException
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probed value.

        Returns:

      • isProbedAgentAlive

        boolean isProbedAgentAlive()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if the agent is alive.
        Returns:
        true if the agent associated to this probe is alive, otherwise false

      • getProbedAgentId

        AgentIdentifier getProbedAgentId()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the identifier of the probed agent.
        Returns:
        the identifier of the probed agent.

      • hasProbeValues

        boolean hasProbeValues()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if this probe contains a value.
        Returns:
        true if a probe value exists, otherwise false

      • hasProbeValue

        boolean hasProbeValue(String probeName)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if the specified probe value exists.
        Parameters:
        probeName - is the value name to test.
        Returns:
        true if a probe value exists, otherwise false
